name: TestWaitForDoIPActivationLineStartup
title: TestWaitForDoIPActivationLineStartup
description: Wait until the DoIP Activation Line startup time has passed after start of the measurement. Please cf. Activation Line (DoIP).
Make sure that the startup time has passed in a test module or unit:
Explicitly deactivate Activation Line using the configured system variable to perform a specific test

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
